title: Making  Kanamycin Base Stock Solution and Dilutions
author: Hendrick  Read

steps_raw.instruction: Weigh 0.5 g of Kanamycin Sulfate undetermined 00:02:00
Add 10 ml of sterile H2O. Dissolve completely. 00:02:00
Pre-wet a 0.2 µm syringe filter by drawing through 5-10 ml of sterile H2O and discard water.
Sterilize Kanamycin Stock through the prepared 0.2 µm syringe filter. Stock may be kept at -20°C for 1 year. 00:02:00
Dilution is to be done at 1:500 stock to water. Ex: Mix 2 µL stock of the prepared stock with 998 µL water for a 1mL solution
